prestazioni: 1GR-FE (4.0L V6) engine: Full forged internals build with JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (9.5:1 compression), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 8000 RPM reliability. Paired with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (10 psi base tune) and custom intercooler setup using a PWR North America 3-core front-mount heat exchanger with -4 AN lines and Earl's Super Stock hoses. Exhaust system features a custom 3-inch stainless steel header-back setup with Burns Stainless 1.75-inch primaries and a MagnaFlow 17299 cat-back with 4-inch dual outlets.

Drivetrain: ARB RD110 front and rear differentials with 4.88:1 gear ratios, upgraded with Yukon Gear & Axle chromoly axles and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential. Transmission is a Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 6-speed manual with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily/race disc and a Fidanza aluminum flywheel. Transfer case upgraded with a Marlin Crawler 4.7:1 gear set for extreme off-road crawling.

Suspension & Chassis: Full long-travel suspension kit from Icon Vehicle Dynamics Stage 5 with 2.5-inch coilovers (14-inch travel front, 12-inch rear) and remote reservoirs. Rear setup includes a custom-fabricated multi-link trailing arm system with Currie Enterprises Johnny Joints. Chassis reinforcement via a custom 4x4 Labs bolt-in roll cage with integrated rock sliders and a front skid plate using 3/8-inch AR500 steel. Braking system features Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear) with 14-inch rotors, paired with Hawk HT-10 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Exterior: Full Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Pro body kit with custom Trail Teams-specific matte Army Green wrap (3M 2080-136) and clear bra (XPEL Ultimate) on high-impact areas. Front bumper replaced with a C4 Fab JK-style winch bumper with a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch and Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods. Rear bumper features a custom-fabricated steel rear bumper with a swing-out tire carrier and dual RotopaX fuel/water can mounts. Hood features a custom carbon fiber vented scoop from Seibon Carbon for intercooler airflow.

Wheels & Tires: Method MR701 Bead Grip wheels (17x9 +18 offset front, 17x10 +30 offset rear) with BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17 front, 35x12.50R17 rear). Fender flares are trimmed and replaced with Bushwacker Flat Style flares in matte black, with custom LED rock lights from Baja Designs (Squadron Pro) mounted underneath.

Interior: Full custom interior with Recaro SR-7 XL seats (fixed-back) in black Alcantara with red stitching, mounted on custom fabricated aluminum seat sliders. Dash and door panels wrapped in Katzkin leather (Toyota Racing Red) with custom embroidery of the Trail Teams logo. Full custom roll cage with integrated MOLLE panel system for storage, and a custom center console housing a 10-inch tablet for off-road navigation (Gaia GPS) and vehicle diagnostics (Tactrix OpenPort 2.0). Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub, paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 pedal set.
